summary: Pantry foundation work is now real but still active and unverified: product/batch/event schema, safe units, service, APIs, page and navigation exist, while approved Pantry tests/docs/receipt are missing. Reusable pantryProducts plus recipeIngredientProductMappings is the provisional canonical product/ingredient nutrition anchor; physical batches remain availability only. Schema/journal/Pantry files are externally owned and unsafe to overlap. Current lint, types, 85 unit tests and 30 integration tests pass. The next safe Nutrition slice is a separate local credential/session plus profile/goal/permission validation kernel in new files; normalized persistence must wait for Pantry migration review.
facts: Pantry Worker T004 remains active with no receipt or package verification.
pantryProducts is separate from pantryBatches and supports generic or packaged reusable food identity.
recipeIngredientProductMappings is the present recipe-to-product bridge.
Pantry unit conversion rejects incompatible dimensions and has no density conversion.
Pantry stock deduction is explicit and transactional but not consumption.
No Pantry nutrient data, planner allocation, grocery shortage or consumption integration exists yet.
Lint, typecheck, 85 unit tests and 30 integration tests pass at this snapshot.
contradictions: The desired Nutrition persistence slice overlaps schema/journal files currently owned by an active Pantry Worker.
Existing ActorContext is adequate for shared Pantry attribution but cannot enforce private Nutrition viewing.
Pantry product identity looks suitable but lacks completed migration/data-integrity acceptance evidence.
ambiguity_requiring_judge: Approve the separate local Nutrition principal credential/session contract.
Keep Pantry product as provisional nutrition anchor until Pantry review.
Define the exact new-file privacy/access Worker package while persistence overlap is unsafe.
Preserve legacy recipe nutrition as explicitly unknown-provenance per-serving data in a later migration.
commands: Current file, symbol, goal-board and git-status inspection
